deterministic_boundary: Transport, redirect, identity marker, locator, excerpt, hash, coverage, and binding checks are deterministic. Semantic support is accepted only from a separately recorded manual review bound to the exact claim and fetched document hashes.

source_access_history.constraint: The CMU ACT-R host failed safe Python/OpenSSL negotiation with DH_KEY_TOO_SMALL. TLS policy was not weakened.
source_access_history.resolution: Use the HTTPS ResearchGate publication record and author-provided full-text copy, retaining DOI 10.1037/0033-295X.106.4.643 for identity.

source_access_history.constraint: The secure ResearchGate publication record returned HTTP 403 to three bounded identified verifier attempts; a separate strict-TLS request to the exact author-uploaded PDF also returned HTTP 403. No anti-bot bypass was attempted.
source_access_history.resolution: The author-uploaded copy and DOI identity remain documented, but the two dependent released citations stay blocked until a public reproducible copy can be fetched under normal access controls. TLS and access controls must not be weakened.

source_access_history.constraint: The original full text remains inaccessible under safe reproducible transport, so it cannot support section-level release claims.
source_access_history.resolution: Use the strict-TLS Crossref DOI record only for title, authors, journal, publication date, pages, publisher and DOI identity; do not infer full-text content.

source_access_history.constraint: The two National Archives HTML licensing URLs presented a self-signed certificate in the Python default strict chain during three bounded verifier attempts.
source_access_history.resolution: Use The National Archives official CDN OGL user guidance PDF under strict TLS; preserve the HTML transport failure and do not weaken certificate verification.

source_access_history.constraint: The OpenAI BrowseComp article returned HTTP 403 to the identified verifier.
source_access_history.resolution: Use the official cdn.openai.com BrowseComp paper under strict TLS; do not attempt an access-control bypass.

source_access_history.constraint: The National Archives official CDN OGL guidance fallback presented the same self-signed certificate chain to Python default strict verification.
source_access_history.resolution: Use the current GOV.UK Knowledge Asset Commercialisation Guide sections 7.5 and 7.6 for the OGL default, characteristics and exclusions; retain all National Archives transport failures and do not weaken TLS.
